files_modified.changes_description: Added tsx arms to get_language_info and get_ts_language
Added tsx extension mapping and supported language entry

compile_belief: The tsx language support has been successfully re-wired with all four required edits completed correctly
compile_belief_reason: All modifications follow the exact specification: (1) get_language_info has a new tsx arm using LANGUAGE_TSX with typescript module queries, (2) get_ts_language has a new tsx arm, (3) EXTENSION_MAP now maps tsx extension to tsx language, (4) supported_languages now includes tsx. All feature gates use lang-tsx and namespace references use typescript:: prefix as required.
